violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Portions of the floor in the kitchen are constructed of concrete, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2025

The hand wash sink in the kitchen, was observed backing up evidenced by the floor drain overflowing when water from the hand sink drain. Establishment has put the hand sink out of order and is using now using the sink on the other side of the cook line as their primary hand sink. Establishment is to make necessary repairs to get sink to drain appropriately. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024

Beef was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Portions of the floor in the kitchen are constructed of concrete, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024
The floor in the kitchen has areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
